metadata.title: Unified Dashboard — React+Vite frontend + FastAPI backend + QA monitoring merged (#331 #342)
metadata.note: QA Flow (#342) merged into Dashboard backend — no separate QA Prefect flow.

child-plan.visual-reference: /home/petteri/Dropbox/github-personal/music-attribution-scaffold/frontend/src/app/page.tsx Style: editorial typography, dark biomedical palette, section-based 2-col layout. Adapt: replace cream/waveform aesthetic with deep navy/teal biomedical palette. Imagery: two-photon microscopy vasculature renders (Nano Banana Pro assets if available, else placeholder gradient with vascular-inspired line art using SVG).
child-plan.critical-rules: - Rule #22: Add DASHBOARD_UI_PORT=3002 and DASHBOARD_API_PORT=8090 to .env.example FIRST. - Rule #17: Dashboard served via Docker service in docker-compose.flows.yml. - QA merged into Dashboard: NO separate qa_flow Prefect flow. Health checks run as FastAPI background tasks on schedule. Results exposed via /api/health endpoint. - Frontend: Vite + React (not Next.js). TypeScript. d3.js for charts. - Backend: FastAPI (Python). One adapter class per data source. - Port 3000 is taken by Grafana — use 3002 for UI, 8090 for API. - NEVER hardcode service URLs in React source — all via VITE_API_URL env var. - Tests for each FastAPI adapter are unit tests (mock the upstream service). - Integration tests for the Docker service use @pytest.mark.requires_docker. - Dashboard sections (per issue #331): Data, Models, Post-Training, Analysis, Biostatistics, Deployment, Drift, Trust. Layout: 2-column, sections stacked.

task.name: Add dashboard ports to .env.example
task.description:
Add to .env.example (FIRST — Rule #22): DASHBOARD_UI_PORT=3002 DASHBOARD_API_PORT=8090 DASHBOARD_REFRESH_INTERVAL_S=30 DASHBOARD_HEALTH_CHECK_INTERVAL_S=300
Note: GRAFANA_PORT=3000 is already taken. LANGFUSE_PORT=3001 is taken. Therefore dashboard UI=3002, API=8090.

task.name: RED: Tests that .env.example has dashboard ports
task.description:
Extend tests/unit/deployment/test_env_single_source_container_paths.py (or create tests/unit/deployment/test_env_dashboard_ports.py):
class TestDashboardEnvVars: - test_dashboard_ui_port_in_env_example() — DASHBOARD_UI_PORT defined - test_dashboard_api_port_in_env_example() — DASHBOARD_API_PORT defined - test_dashboard_ports_not_conflict_with_grafana() — 3002 != 3000 - test_dashboard_service_in_compose() — yaml.safe_load(compose), service 'dashboard-ui' exists - test_dashboard_api_service_in_compose() — service 'dashboard-api' exists

phase.name: FastAPI backend — service adapter framework
phase.description: The hard/valuable part: FastAPI adapter framework with one class per data source. Each adapter: connect(), query(endpoint, params) -> dict, cached with TTL. All adapters are independently testable with mocked upstream services.

task.name: RED: Tests for adapter base class + MLflow adapter
GREEN: ServiceAdapter ABC + core adapters
task.description:
Create src/minivess/dashboard/: - __init__.py - adapters/__init__.py - adapters/base.py — ServiceAdapter ABC with connect/query/cache/status - adapters/mlflow_adapter.py — MLflow REST API adapter - adapters/prefect_adapter.py — Prefect REST API adapter - adapters/bentoml_adapter.py — BentoML metrics adapter - adapters/evidently_adapter.py — Evidently JSON report adapter - adapters/prometheus_adapter.py — Prometheus instant query adapter - adapters/optuna_adapter.py — Optuna PostgreSQL study adapter - adapters/duckdb_adapter.py — DuckDB in-process analytics - adapters/health_adapter.py — aggregated health check across all adapters (QA merged here)
FastAPI app: - app/main.py — FastAPI app, lifespan handler initializing all adapters - app/routers/mlflow.py — /api/mlflow/* endpoints - app/routers/prefect.py — /api/prefect/* endpoints - app/routers/serving.py — /api/serving/* endpoints - app/routers/health.py — /api/health/* (QA monitoring — drift alerts, model health) - app/routers/analytics.py — /api/analytics/* (DuckDB queries) - app/background.py — scheduled health check tasks (replaces QA flow)
QA monitoring in app/background.py (periodic tasks, default 5-min interval): - check_prediction_drift() — queries Evidently JSON reports - check_model_health() — runs WeightWatcher on latest checkpoint - check_data_quality() — queries whylogs profiles - POST to /api/health/alerts when thresholds exceeded - Log alert to MLflow (experiment: minivess_monitoring)

phase.name: React + Vite frontend — layout + sections
phase.description: Frontend: Vite + React + TypeScript + d3.js + TailwindCSS. Visual style: deep navy background (#0a1628), teal accent (#14b8a6), warm white cards, biomedical palette. 2-column section layout. Hero with two-photon microscopy imagery. Editorial typography (Inter or similar clean sans-serif).

task.name: Scaffold React+Vite project
task.description:
Create frontend/ at repo root: npm create vite@latest frontend -- --template react-ts cd frontend && npm install npm install d3 @types/d3 tailwindcss autoprefixer postcss
Key files to create: - frontend/src/App.tsx — main layout: sidebar nav + main content area - frontend/src/lib/api.ts — typed fetch wrappers for each /api/* endpoint - frontend/src/hooks/useAdapterData.ts — React hook with auto-refresh (DASHBOARD_REFRESH_INTERVAL_S) - frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx — green/amber/red health badge - frontend/src/components/MetricCard.tsx — number + label + sparkline card - frontend/src/components/SectionHeader.tsx — editorial-caps section label - frontend/src/components/charts/BarChart.tsx — d3.js bar chart (experiment metrics) - frontend/src/components/charts/LineChart.tsx — d3.js line chart (drift over time) - frontend/src/components/charts/BoxPlot.tsx — d3.js box plot (model comparison, biostatistics)
Dashboard sections (each as src/sections/): - DataSection.tsx — volume counts, spacing distributions, DVC version, 3 dataset tiles - ModelSection.tsx — 4 model families (DynUNet, Mamba, SAM3, VesselFM), DSC/clDice bars - PostTrainingSection.tsx — SWA/calibration improvements, conformal coverage - AnalysisSection.tsx — ensemble comparison bars, strategy table - BiostatisticsSection.tsx — bootstrap CIs, pairwise significance table - DeploymentSection.tsx — BentoML endpoints, latency/throughput, ONNX model sizes - DriftSection.tsx — Evidently drift metrics, whylogs profiles, alert badges - TrustSection.tsx — WeightWatcher spectral metrics, Deepchecks validation results
Layout: 2-column grid inside each section. Sections stacked vertically with accent dividers between them (similar to music-attribution-scaffold pattern).

task.name: Docker build for frontend

phase.name: QA monitoring integrated into health adapter
phase.description: #342 QA monitoring is implemented as FastAPI background tasks in the dashboard backend. No separate Prefect flow. The /api/health endpoint aggregates all monitoring results. Human-in-the-loop: health alerts link to GitHub Issues creation via GitHub API.

task.name: RED: Tests for health adapter (QA monitoring)
task.description:
Create tests/unit/dashboard/test_health_adapter.py:
class TestHealthAdapter: - test_health_adapter_aggregates_all_adapters() — queries MLflow, Prefect, BentoML adapters - test_health_adapter_flags_drift_alert() — Evidently drift > threshold → alert=True - test_health_adapter_model_health_spectral() — WeightWatcher alpha < 2.0 → warning - test_health_alert_creates_github_issue() — mock GH API, verify issue POST called - test_health_alert_not_duplicate() — if issue already open with same title, skip creation - test_health_summary_schema() — returns {"overall": str, "alerts": [...], "last_checked": str} - test_health_refresh_interval_from_env() — reads DASHBOARD_HEALTH_CHECK_INTERVAL_S

task.name: GREEN: health_adapter.py + background scheduler
task.description:
Implement src/minivess/dashboard/adapters/health_adapter.py: - Queries all adapters in parallel (asyncio.gather) - Applies threshold rules (from configs/dashboard/health_thresholds.yaml) - Creates GitHub Issues for critical alerts (gh api via subprocess or PyGithub) - Returns HealthSummary dataclass
Implement src/minivess/dashboard/app/background.py: - asyncio periodic task (default: 5 min) calling health_adapter.check_all() - Results stored in-memory cache (Redis optional, dict for MVP) - Exposed via /api/health GET endpoint
Create configs/dashboard/health_thresholds.yaml: drift_psi_threshold: 0.2 model_alpha_min: 2.0 flow_failure_window_hours: 24 latency_p99_ms_max: 500

task.name: Add dashboard services to docker-compose.flows.yml
task.description:
Add to deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml:
dashboard-api: build: context: . dockerfile: deployment/docker/Dockerfile.dashboard-api ports: - "${DASHBOARD_API_PORT:-8090}:${DASHBOARD_API_PORT:-8090}" environment: <<: *x-common-env DASHBOARD_HEALTH_CHECK_INTERVAL_S: ${DASHBOARD_HEALTH_CHECK_INTERVAL_S:-300} DASHBOARD_API_PORT: ${DASHBOARD_API_PORT:-8090} volumes: - ${MLRUNS_DIR:-./mlruns}:/mlruns:ro - ${DATA_DIR:-./data}:/data:ro
dashboard-ui: build: context: . dockerfile: deployment/docker/Dockerfile.dashboard-ui args: VITE_API_URL: http://${DASHBOARD_API_DOCKER_HOST:-dashboard-api}:${DASHBOARD_API_PORT:-8090} ports: - "${DASHBOARD_UI_PORT:-3002}:80" depends_on: - dashboard-api

task.name: Integration smoke tests for dashboard
Run full suite + pre-commit + PR
task.steps: uv run pytest tests/unit/dashboard/ -q uv run pytest tests/integration/dashboard/ -q -m "not requires_docker" uv run pre-commit run --all-files cd frontend && npm run build # verify frontend builds git checkout -b feat/dashboard-ui git add src/minivess/dashboard/ git add deployment/docker/Dockerfile.dashboard-api git add deployment/docker/Dockerfile.dashboard-ui git add deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml git add frontend/ git add configs/dashboard/ git add tests/unit/dashboard/ tests/integration/dashboard/ git add .env.example git commit -m "feat(dashboard): Unified React+Vite dashboard + QA monitoring merged (#331 #342)" git push -u origin feat/dashboard-ui gh pr create --title "feat(dashboard): Unified React+Vite dashboard + integrated QA monitoring" \ --body "Closes #331, #342"
